message:
fix(index): harden CHSW parser against OOM from untrusted file values

Add bounds validation for dimension, record_count, and doc_id_len
values read from CHSW binary files before using them in allocations.
This prevents denial-of-service via crafted files that claim billions
of records or unreasonably large dimensions/doc_ids.

Same vulnerability class as FSVI and WAL fixes in 03fde86.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
